titel: The Swedish National Audit Office's report on the government's management of the development of the civilian defense system.
html:
In this document, the government outlines its assessment of the conclusions and recommendations presented in the report "The Government's Management of the Development of the Civil Defence System" (RiR 2025:4) by the Swedish National Audit Office.

The Swedish National Audit Office's overall assessment in the report is that the government's management of the development of the civil defence system has not been sufficiently effective during the period under review, 2015-2024. The government's management has lacked clarity regarding what needs to be achieved by whom, at what time, and to what extent. Furthermore, the National Audit Office assesses that the documentation from the Swedish Armed Forces and the Swedish Civil Contingencies Agency (MSB) has improved during the period, but that it was only towards the end of the review period that the documentation became concrete enough to enable effective prioritization.

The government largely agrees with the Swedish National Audit Office's observations that the government's management of the development of the civil defence system was not sufficiently effective between 2015 and 2022. However, according to the government's assessment, the management and follow-up have significantly improved since 2022. The government is continuously working to further strengthen the management and follow-up, with a particular focus on transparency and efficiency, in order to achieve the increased level of ambition required to enhance the capabilities of the civil defence system.

The Swedish National Audit Office provides the government with three recommendations. In this document, the government outlines several measures that have been taken and are planned to improve the management of the civil defence system. These measures include both legislative changes and financial management.
tldr: The Swedish National Audit Office has reviewed how the government manages civil defense and found that the work has not been sufficiently effective between 2015 and 2024. The government acknowledges that it has been challenging to manage the work in the past, but believes that it has improved in recent years.
lattlast:
The Swedish National Audit Office is an agency that monitors how the state uses money and operates. They have produced a report on how the government has managed the development of the civil defense system from 2015 to 2024. The report indicates that the government has not been clear enough about who is responsible for what, and when the work should be completed.

During the period under review, agencies such as the Armed Forces and the Swedish Civil Contingencies Agency (MSB) have improved their ability to share information. However, according to the National Audit Office, it has still been difficult to prioritize the right tasks because the information was not detailed enough until recently.

The government acknowledges that the management has not been effective enough during the initial years. However, they state that the situation has improved significantly since 2022. The government is now working to make the processes even clearer, in order to increase the country's ability to protect its citizens.

To address the problems, the National Audit Office has provided the government with three recommendations. The government has already begun working on changes to laws and regulations, as well as on how funds should be allocated to strengthen the civil defense system in the future.
